title: Australian Crumble with Almond Flaky Topping
description: A delicious dessert featuring a crumble topping with a flaky texture and almond flavor, served over a bed of sweet fruit.
instructions: In a mixing bowl, combine sliced peaches, granulated sugar, and almond paste. Toss to coat.
Roll out the flaky pastry and place over the peach mixture.
Fold the edges of the pastry to create a crust, pressing gently.
In a separate bowl, combine gluten-free flour and softened butter for crumble topping.
Spread the crumble mixture evenly over the pastry.
Bake for 35-40 minutes or until the pastry is golden brown and the fruit is tender.
Garnish with almond slivers and serve warm.
